dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend mimecastEventType = case( isnotempty(tostring(mimecast_body.auditType)), 'audit', isnotempty(tostring(mimecast_body.impersonationResults)), 'ttp_impersonation', tostring(mimecast_body.Logtype) == 'email_ttp_ap', 'email_ttp_ap', tostring(mimecast_body.Logtype) == 'seg_dlp', 'seg_dlp', isnotempty(tostring(mimecast_body.Logtype)), 'seg_cg', isnotempty(tostring(mimecast_body.fileHash)) or isnotempty(tostring(mimecast_body.sha256)), 'ttp_attachment', isnotempty(tostring(mimecast_body.url)), 'ttp_url', 'unknown') | extend _ts = case( isnotempty(tostring(mimecast_body.eventTime)), todatetime(tostring(mimecast_body.eventTime)), isnotempty(tostring(mimecast_body['date'])), todatetime(tostring(mimecast_body['date'])), isnotempty(tostring(mimecast_body.timestamp)), datetime(1970-01-01) + tolong(mimecast_body.timestamp) * 1ms, datetime(null)) | extend TimeGenerated = iff(isnull(_ts) or _ts < ago(2d), now(), _ts) | extend mimecastEventId = case( isnotempty(tostring(mimecast_body.id)), tostring(mimecast_body.id), isnotempty(tostring(mimecast_body.processingId)), tostring(mimecast_body.processingId), hash_sha256(strcat(tostring(mimecast_body.messageId), '|', tostring(mimecast_body.url), '|', tostring(mimecast_body['date'])))) | extend mimecastLogtype = tostring(mimecast_body.Logtype) | extend mimecastSubtype = tostring(mimecast_body.subtype) | project TimeGenerated, mimecastEventType, mimecastEventId, mimecastLogtype, mimecastSubtype, mimecast_body = tostring(mimecast_body)
